nodes.name: Eumyias
nodes.summary: Eumyias（Eumyias）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联11种鸟类，如Matinan blue flycatcher、Blue-fronted blue flycatcher、Timor blue flycatcher等11种鸟类。

nodes.name: Turquoise flycatcher
nodes.summary: Turquoise flycatcher（Eumyias panayensis）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联1种鸟类，如Turquoise flycatcher。

nodes.name: Turquoise flycatcher
nodes.summary: The turquoise flycatcher (Eumyias panayensis), also known as the island flycatcher, is a species of bird in the family Muscicapidae. It is found in Indonesia and the Philippines. Its natural habitat is subtropical or tropical moist montane forests. References
